languages.text: {n}При виде кольца Изимонд отчетливо скрипит зубами.{/n} "Вот как? Что ж, я не стану препятствовать воле {mf|того|той}, кто действует по санкции сенешаля".

traits.locale_text: {n}При виде кольца Изимонд отчетливо скрипит зубами.{/n} "Вот как? Что ж, я не стану препятствовать воле {mf|того|той}, кто действует по санкции сенешаля".

languages.text: {n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."
languages.original_text: {n}При виде кольца Изимонд отчетливо скрипит зубами.{/n} "Вот как? Что ж, я не стану препятствовать воле {mf|того|той}, кто действует по санкции сенешаля".

traits.locale_text: {n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."
{n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."
{n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."

languages.text: {n}Al ver el anillo, Sauerback aprieta los dientes sonoramente.{/n} «¿Ah, sí? En ese caso, no obstruiré la voluntad de quien actúa bajo la protección de la Senescal».
languages.original_text: {n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: {n}Al ver el anillo, Sauerback aprieta los dientes sonoramente.{/n} «¿Ah, sí? En ese caso, no obstruiré la voluntad de quien actúa bajo la protección de la Senescal».

languages.text: {n}看到戒指，苏尔贝克咬牙切齿的声音清晰可闻。{/n}“既然如此，好吧，我可不会阻碍一个有总领庇佑之人的意愿。”
languages.original_text: {n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: {n}看到戒指，苏尔贝克咬牙切齿的声音清晰可闻。{/n}“既然如此，好吧，我可不会阻碍一个有总领庇佑之人的意愿。”

languages.text: {n}À la vue de la bague, Sauerback grince ostensiblement des dents.{/n} « Allons bon... Loin de moi l'idée de faire obstruction à {mf|un agent mandaté|une agente mandatée} par la sénéchale. »
languages.original_text: {n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: {n}À la vue de la bague, Sauerback grince ostensiblement des dents.{/n} « Allons bon... Loin de moi l'idée de faire obstruction à {mf|un agent mandaté|une agente mandatée} par la sénéchale. »

languages.text: {n}Sauerback, yüzüğü görünce duyulabilir bir şekilde dişlerini gıcırdatıyor.{/n} "Öyle mi? Pekâlâ, Seneşal'in himayesinde hareket eden birinin iradesine engel olmayacağım."
languages.original_text: {n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sauerback, yüzüğü görünce duyulabilir bir şekilde dişlerini gıcırdatıyor.{/n} "Öyle mi? Pekâlâ, Seneşal'in himayesinde hareket eden birinin iradesine engel olmayacağım."

languages.text: {n}Als er den Ring sieht, knirscht Sauerback hörbar mit seinen Zähnen.{/n} "Ist das so? Nun, ich werde mich niemandem widersetzen, der im Namen des Truchsess handelt."
languages.original_text: {n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: {n}Als er den Ring sieht, knirscht Sauerback hörbar mit seinen Zähnen.{/n} "Ist das so? Nun, ich werde mich niemandem widersetzen, der im Namen des Truchsess handelt."

languages.text: {n}指輪を見たサウアーバックは歯を食いしばる。{/n}「そうか。ならば、摂政の庇護を受ける者の一意を阻むことはしない」
languages.original_text: {n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."
